keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Giuliano Simeone (Atletico Madrid) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Villarreal 1, Atletico Madrid 0. Dani Parejo (Villarreal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Villarreal 2, Atletico Madrid 0. Ayoze Pérez (Villarreal) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal! Villarreal 3, Atletico Madrid 0. Georges Mikautadze (Villarreal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Ayoze Pérez following a fast break.
Goal! Villarreal 3, Atletico Madrid 1. Marc Pubill (Atletico Madrid) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Antoine Griezmann with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Villarreal 4, Atletico Madrid 1. Pape Gueye (Villarreal) left footed shot from outside the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Nicolas Pépé.
First Half ends, Villarreal 4, Atletico Madrid 1.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Alexander Sørloth replaces Giuliano Simeone.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Aleksa Puric replaces Dávid Hancko.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Matteo Ruggeri replaces Marc Pubill.
Second Half begins Villarreal 4, Atletico Madrid 1.
Goal! Villarreal 5, Atletico Madrid 1. Ayoze Pérez (Villarreal) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Nicolas Pépé.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Javier Boñar replaces Ademola Lookman.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Javier Morcillo replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Villarreal. Alassane Diatta replaces Dani Parejo.
Substitution, Villarreal. Sergi Cardona replaces Alfonso Pedraza.
Substitution, Villarreal. Logan Costa replaces Pape Gueye.
Substitution, Villarreal. Pau Cabanes replaces Ayoze Pérez.
Substitution, Villarreal. Carlos Macià replaces Georges Mikautadze because of an injury.
Second Half ends, Villarreal 5, Atletico Madrid 1.

stats.description: The number of shots on target a goalkeeper has faced.

scoringPlays.text: Giuliano Simeone (Atletico Madrid) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Villarreal 1, Atletico Madrid 0. Dani Parejo (Villarreal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Villarreal 2, Atletico Madrid 0. Ayoze Pérez (Villarreal) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal! Villarreal 3, Atletico Madrid 0. Georges Mikautadze (Villarreal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Ayoze Pérez following a fast break.
Goal! Villarreal 3, Atletico Madrid 1. Marc Pubill (Atletico Madrid) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Antoine Griezmann with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Villarreal 4, Atletico Madrid 1. Pape Gueye (Villarreal) left footed shot from outside the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Nicolas Pépé.
Goal! Villarreal 5, Atletico Madrid 1. Ayoze Pérez (Villarreal) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Nicolas Pépé.
Carlos Macià replaces Georges Mikautadze because of an injury.

timeline.text: Giuliano Simeone (Atletico Madrid) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Villarreal 1, Atletico Madrid 0. Dani Parejo (Villarreal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Villarreal 2, Atletico Madrid 0. Ayoze Pérez (Villarreal) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal! Villarreal 3, Atletico Madrid 0. Georges Mikautadze (Villarreal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Ayoze Pérez following a fast break.
Goal! Villarreal 3, Atletico Madrid 1. Marc Pubill (Atletico Madrid) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Antoine Griezmann with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Villarreal 4, Atletico Madrid 1. Pape Gueye (Villarreal) left footed shot from outside the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Nicolas Pépé.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Alexander Sørloth replaces Giuliano Simeone.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Aleksa Puric replaces Dávid Hancko.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Matteo Ruggeri replaces Marc Pubill.
Goal! Villarreal 5, Atletico Madrid 1. Ayoze Pérez (Villarreal) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Nicolas Pépé.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Javier Boñar replaces Ademola Lookman.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Javier Morcillo replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Villarreal. Alassane Diatta replaces Dani Parejo.
Substitution, Villarreal. Sergi Cardona replaces Alfonso Pedraza.
Substitution, Villarreal. Logan Costa replaces Pape Gueye.
Substitution, Villarreal. Pau Cabanes replaces Ayoze Pérez.
Substitution, Villarreal. Carlos Macià replaces Georges Mikautadze because of an injury.
